scriptLines: fecha_control = iif(     instr(toString(fecha_control), '-') > 0,     toDate(toString(fecha_control), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),     iif(         toInteger(left(toString(fecha_control),2)) > 12,         toDate(toString(fecha_control), 'dd/MM/yyyy'),         toDate(toString(fecha_control), 'MM/dd/yyyy')     ) ),

ci_beneficiaria = upper(     iif(         rlike(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), '^[A-Za-z]{2}\\d+'),         concat(             substring(                 regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''),                 3,                 length(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', '')) - 2             ),             '-',             substring(                 regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''),                 1,                 2             )         ),         iif(             rlike(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''), '\\d+[A-Za-z]{2}$'),             concat(                 substring(                     regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''),                     1,                     length(regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', '')) - 2                 ),                 '-',                 right(                     regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', ''),                     2                 )             ),             regexReplace(ci_beneficiaria, '[-_]', '')         )     ) ),
